name: Southern Pecan Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
CRUST: Combine ingredients and press into bottom of 10-inch springform pan.
FILLING: Blend 1/3 cup firmly packed brown sugar, 2 tablespoons flour, 1 tablespoon butter, and 1 cup finely chopped pecans together and set aside.
CAKE: Beat 4 (8 oz.) packages cream cheese until smooth. Gradually add 3/4 cup firmly packed brown sugar, 2 tablespoons cornstarch, 6 eggs, 1/2 cup sour cream, and 1/4 cup bourbon. Mix until well combined. Pour into prepared crust.
Bake at 225 degrees F for about 45 minutes longer. Cool and refrigerate.
BOURBON SAUCE: Melt 1/4 cup butter. Add 2/3 cup firmly packed brown sugar and stir until dissolved. Add 1/4 cup heavy cream and 1/4 cup bourbon. Simmer 5 minutes. Spread over cold cheesecake before serving.
